title: REBX: Multi-Channel Refurbished Commerce
summary: Owned RebX end-to-end across DTC and marketplaces — unified grading, trade-in inventory, and channel-tier merchandising on Shopify, eBay (190K+ sold), and Temu (82 SKUs, 4.5★).
challenge: Refurbished tech requires trust at every touchpoint. RebX needed one operating model — certified quality, clear grades, warranty, returns — deployed across an owned Shopify channel and two marketplace reach layers, without fragmenting brand, inventory, or margin discipline.
strategy: Ran a three-tier channel architecture: Shopify as the DTC anchor (grading, trade-in, BNPL), eBay as the volume engine (custom store, 9K+ listings, 99.6% feedback), and Temu as a margin-screened discovery layer (82 SKUs, local warehouse). Shared inventory logic and RebX Certified positioning tied the programme together.
implementation: Built RebX Certified Refurbished standard — 90-point quality check, four cosmetic grades, 12-month warranty — applied across all channels
Deployed trade-in valuation flow as the inventory flywheel feeding Shopify, eBay, and Temu catalogues
Established channel-tier pricing and listing rules to protect margin on Temu while maximising reach on eBay
Unified PDP trust architecture: grading guides, warranty terms, and condition labels adapted per platform

highlights: Homepage hero with trust bar — free delivery, 12-month warranty, 30-day returns
Interactive 3D grading guide and trade-in programme
Klarna, Clearpay, and Shop Pay on higher-ticket refurbished devices
